1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a stringed instrument; by extension, a poem set to music; specifically, an epigram
David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

2.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
2.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: properly, a creaking (or shrill sound), i.e. shout (of joy or grief)
2.kj: cry, gladness, joy, proclamation, rejoicing, shouting, sing(-ing), triumph.

2.gl: to prick up the ears, i.e. hearken
2.kj: attend, (cause to) hear(-ken), give heed, incline, mark (well), regard.

2.gl: intercession, supplication; by implication, a hymn

3.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
3.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

3.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
3.kj: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) lou

3.gl: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
3.kj: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, re
3.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

3.gl: properly, a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed); generally, a rock or boulder; figuratively, a refuge; also an edge (as precipitous)
3.kj: edge, [idiom] (mighty) God (one), rock, [idiom] sharp, stone, [idiom] strength, [idiom] strong. See also H1049 (בֵּית צוּר).
[idiom] after, border, brim, brink, edge, end, (in-) finite, frontier, outmost coast, quarter, shore, (out-) side, [idiom] some, ut(-ter-) most (part).
3.dv: or (negative only) קֵצֶה; from H7096 (קָצָה); (used in a great variety of applications and idioms; compare H7093 (קֵץ))

3.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
3.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
3.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

4.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
4.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
4.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

4.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
4.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

4.gl: a tower (from its size or height); by analogy, a rostrum; figuratively, a (pyramidal) bed of flowers
4.kj: castle, flower, tower. Compare the names following.
4.dv: also (in plural) feminine מִגְדָּלָה; from H1431 (גָּדַל);

4.gl: strength in various applications (force, security, majesty, praise)
4.kj: boldness, loud, might, power, strength, strong.

4.dv: or (fully) אוֹיֵב; active participle of H340 (אָיַב);

5.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always

5.gl: an edge or extremity; specifically (of a bird or army) a wing, (of a garment or bedclothing) a flap, (of the earth) a quarter, (of a building) a pinnacle
5.kj: [phrase] bird, border, corner, end, feather(-ed), [idiom] flying, [phrase] (one an-) other, overspreading, [idiom] quarters, skirt, [idiom] sort, uttermost part, wing(-ed).

5.gl: properly, to turn aside from the road (for a lodging or any other purpose), i.e. sojourn (as a guest); also to shrink, fear (as in a strange place); also to gather forhostility (as afraid)
5.kj: abide, assemble, be afraid, dwell, fear, gather (together), inhabitant, remain, sojourn, stand in awe, (be) stranger, [idiom] surely.

5.gl: a cover (in a good or a bad, a literal or a figurative sense)
5.kj: backbiting, covering, covert, [idiom] disguise(-th), hiding place, privily, protection, secret(-ly, place).

5.gl: to flee for protection; figuratively, to confide in
a tent (as clearly conspicuous from a distance)

6.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
6.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

6.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)

6.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
6.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

6.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
6.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

6.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
6.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

6.gl: something occupied; a conquest; also a patrimony

7.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)

7.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

7.gl: to add or augment (often adverbial, to continue to do a thing)
7.kj: add, [idiom] again, [idiom] any more, [idiom] cease, [idiom] come more, [phrase] conceive again, continue, exceed, [idiom] further, [idiom] gather together, get more, give more-ove

7.gl: properly, a revolution of time, i.e. an age or generation; also a dwelling
a year (as a revolution of time)

8.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
8.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
8.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

8.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry

8.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
8.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

8.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
8.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

8.gl: to guard, in a good sense (to protect, maintain, obey, etc.) or a bad one (to conceal, etc.)
8.kj: besieged, hidden thing, keep(-er, -ing), monument, observe, preserve(-r), subtil, watcher(-man).
